name: Protocol
description: Record algebra. Defines the six operations (select, filter, join, transform, project, render) as pure functions over the kernel tables. No HTTP, no filesystem, no network at this layer.
invariants: all operations accept a SQLite3 instance and return plain PHP arrays
no operations write to entities or schemas directly — writes go through capabilities layer
all operations are deterministic given the same DB state
no network calls, no file I/O, no shell_exec
